# IThemeAccess.ColorRegistry property

Phase 9b.5 — register plugin-owned colours (with a default per built-in preset) and read their resolved values via the returned slot handle. Register only colours a plugin owns; for a colour that should match the theme, read [`Colors`](../IThemePalette/Colors.md) directly instead.

```csharp
public IColorRegistry ColorRegistry { get; }
```
